WANG YUXIANG

王煜翔 WANG Yuxiang

米兰新美术学院 (Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti, Milano) Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti, Milano (NABA)

我是一名聚焦角色绑定、技术美术与视觉叙事的创作者，具备游戏设计、影视短片及 3D/VFX 制作经验，正持续探索技术工具与艺术表达的结合。 I am a creator focused on character rigging, technical art, and visual storytelling, with experience in game design, short films, and 3D/VFX production. I am continuously exploring the intersection of technical tools and artistic expression.

  • 专业： 创意技术(Creative Technology)——游戏/动画方向
  • 2026届在读本科生
  • Major: Creative Technology — Game / Animation Track
  • Undergraduate, Class of 2026

主要项目 Featured Projects

Face Rigging 项目 Face Rigging Project
Full Body Rigging 项目 Full Body Rigging Project
Taison 项目 Taison Project
UE PCG 项目 UE PCG Project
Whiteout 游戏开发项目 Whiteout Game Dev Project
